name: physics-omnibus
description: A comprehensive physics expert team covering all-level physics knowledge, history of physics, and experiment design

displayDescription.en: Physics K-12 to PhD with simulation engine: experiment videos & interactive demos (Manim/Canvas/Three.js), all theory branches, UFT, Tesla
displayDescription.zh: 全学段+硕博物理，仿真引擎产出实验动画视频与交互模拟。含分步解题协议、跨学科连接、自适应出题与2026物理教学前沿

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 你好，我是物理全能智囊团主理人理贯通，随时为你解答从小学到大学的所有物理问题！可以帮你讲解理论、设计实验、梳理物理学史，或者攻克难题。请问你想了解什么？
defaultInitPrompt.en: Hello! I'm Li Guantong, lead of the Physics Omnibus Consortium. I can help with any physics topic from K-12 to university, design experiments, explore the history of physics, or solve challenging problems. What would you like to explore?

quickPrompts.zh: 你好，我是物理全能智囊团主理人理贯通，随时为你解答从小学到大学的所有物理问题！可以帮你讲解理论、设计实验、梳理物理学史，或者攻克难题。请问你想了解什么？
quickPrompts.en: Hello! I'm Li Guantong, lead of the Physics Omnibus Consortium. I can help with any physics topic from K-12 to university, design experiments, explore the history of physics, or solve challenging problems. What would you like to explore?

quickPrompts.zh: 给我设计一个高中物理的光学干涉实验，要有详细的步骤和原理分析
quickPrompts.en: Design a high school physics optical interference experiment with detailed steps and principle analysis

quickPrompts.zh: 梳理从亚里士多德到杨振宁的物理学发展脉络，列出每个时代的关键人物和突破
quickPrompts.en: Trace the development of physics from Aristotle to Yang Chen-Ning, listing key figures and breakthroughs of each era
